title: X-Crisp Winey Lamb Mince Spherify
description: A unique whole30-friendly German dish featuring crispy lamb mince encased in a wine-infused gel for hangover-cure purposes.
instructions: Mix the lamb mince, flour, sugar, vinegar, oil, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Pour half of the mixture into a hot pan and cook until golden brown on all sides, then transfer to a bowl. Repeat with remaining mixture.
Gently heat milk in another pan and add spherification agent (like xanthan gum) according to instructions.
Stir gel into lamb mince until fully incorporated. Gently fold cooked lamb into the gel.
Pour mixture into silicone molds, cover with plastic wrap, chill for 4 hours or overnight, then refrigerate or freeze.
Remove from molds and serve as a side dish or main course.
